## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release/package change

## Correctness

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Existing tests cover this change
- [ ] Not applicable

## Performance Impact

Mention any expected impact on Flow, Ferric protocol, Raft, Bitcask, NIFs, memory, disk, or startup/recovery.

## Public API / Docs

- [ ] Public API unchanged
- [ ] Public API changed and docs updated
- [ ] Not applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, local state, benchmark logs, or generated artifacts committed
- [ ] Docs use neutral product language
- [ ] Release/package metadata still correct
